title: Senior Investment Banker at AU Small Finance Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at AU Small Finance Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with AU Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About AU Small Finance Bank:
AU Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank!
